title: Environment Matrix

environments.purpose: Local agent execution, discovery, artifact generation, and deterministic smoke validation.
environments.network_policy: disabled by descriptor unless a later approved task explicitly enables it
environments.write_policy: workspace-write for execution-framework and generated migration-artifacts only
environments.data_policy: No blocked secret paths are read or emitted; credential material is excluded by packet policy.

environments.purpose: Replay, reconciliation, and validation lane before any production-impacting change.
environments.network_policy: kept disabled in descriptor for this package; external staging integrations require explicit approval
environments.write_policy: artifact/proof writes plus registry rows in the envctl database model
environments.risk_ceiling: R2 by descriptor, R3 only when a later approval-gated cutover task declares it
environments.data_policy: Use redacted evidence links and hashes, not raw secrets or private keys.

environments.purpose: Production reference and cutover target; this artifact generation task performs no production mutation.
environments.root: external production targets, not written by this task
environments.network_policy: no production network writes from ART-114
environments.write_policy: blocked for production systems in this phase
environments.risk_ceiling: R5 operations require human approval and are outside this artifact task
environments.approval_mode: human approval required for destructive or production-impacting operations
environments.data_policy: Secrets, private keys, .env files, pem/key material, and private_keys paths are blocked from artifact output.
validation: production differences are recorded as policy constraints
cutover/rollback tasks must add separate approval evidence
artifact registry stores only file hashes and metadata

matrix.dev: FlexNetOS workspace primary_root with local execution-framework writes
matrix.stage: Same primary_root plus envctl SQLite model for replayable validation state
matrix.prod: Production targets are referenced only; mutation is blocked in this phase

matrix.dev: target descriptor, generated task packet, repo/package scan, contract manifest
matrix.stage: same inputs plus proof records from registry and shared schema tasks
matrix.prod: approved cutover configuration only; not generated or applied by ART-114

matrix.dev: blocked path patterns are excluded from reads and artifact content
matrix.stage: evidence is linked by hash and metadata; raw secrets remain out of scope
matrix.prod: secret material must stay external to artifacts and requires separate controls

matrix.dev: R2 maximum automatic risk, approval-gated descriptor
matrix.stage: R2 validation lane; higher-risk cutover work belongs to later tasks
matrix.prod: production-impacting or destructive work requires human approval

matrix.dev: matrix markdown and JSON under migration-artifacts plus proof/log files
matrix.stage: registry rows, validation rows, graph links, and proof ledger evidence
matrix.prod: no output is written into production by this task

drift_controls: Capture dev/stage/prod differences as artifact data before VER-300 validation.
Link registry evidence to target descriptor, packet, and prerequisite proof records.
Keep production mutations out of artifact generation.
